meta.title: NORABYTE — Custom Software Development
meta.description: We transform your ideas into high-impact digital solutions. Websites, business systems, online stores and more, designed to grow your business.
meta.ogTitle: NORABYTE — Software that drives your business
meta.ogDescription: We create custom systems and applications for businesses. From your first website to a complete business management system.
meta.keywords: software development, business systems, websites, online stores, point of sale, custom applications, Mexico

hero.headline: We build your company's digital future
hero.subheadline: We turn your ideas and processes into digital systems that work, look amazing, and grow your business.

services.title: What can we do for your business?
services.subtitle: We develop all kinds of digital systems tailored exactly to what you need, without any technical complexity on your part.

items.title: Websites & Landing Pages
items.description: Your first impression online. We create professional websites that showcase your business, attract customers, and generate sales — 24/7.

items.title: Online Stores
items.description: Sell your products or services online. Shopping cart, secure payments, inventory control, and an admin panel to manage everything from your computer.

items.title: Business Management Systems
items.description: Is your business still running on paper or spreadsheets? We build a custom digital system for you: payroll, inventory, customers, reports, and everything you need.

items.title: Point of Sale
items.description: Cash register system for stores, restaurants, and businesses. Record sales, control inventory, print tickets and daily reports.

items.title: Desktop Applications
items.description: Software installed on your computer for specific tasks: employee attendance tracking, monitoring systems, access control, and more.

items.title: Custom Systems
items.description: Have a very specific need? We'll build it. From internal portals and unique management systems to automating repetitive processes.

process.title: Our Process
process.subtitle: A clear process with no surprises, where you always know what stage your project is at.

steps.title: Analysis
steps.description: You tell us what you need and what your goals are. No commitment, no cost. We just listen and understand your business.

steps.title: UX/UI Design
steps.description: We show you what your system will look like and how it will work before we start building it. You approve every detail.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: We build your system in short stages, showing you progress constantly so you're always up to date.

steps.title: QA Testing
steps.description: We test everything thoroughly before delivery: making sure it works perfectly, is easy to use, and has no errors.

steps.title: Deployment
steps.description: We deliver your system working 100% and teach you how to use it. Your employees will operate everything without a problem.

steps.title: Evolution
steps.description: We don't leave you alone. After delivery we remain available for adjustments, improvements, and any questions you have.

portfolio.title: Projects that speak for themselves
portfolio.subtitle: Real businesses that trusted us and transformed their operations.

items.title: Online Store — RetailMex
items.description: Online store with 500+ products, integration with national and international payments, real-time inventory control, and a complete admin panel.

items.title: Logistics System — LogisTech
items.description: Fleet management system with real-time tracking, driver management, automatic route reports, and an executive dashboard for decision-making.

items.title: Financial Control System
items.description: Expense and income tracking platform for businesses with automatic reports, trend analysis, and smart alerts.

about.title: Professional development from start to finish
about.description: We are a team dedicated to creating digital systems that truly solve problems. We work hand-in-hand with you to deeply understand your business and build the exact solution you need, applying the highest standards of quality and performance.

values.title: Clarity above all
values.description: We explain everything in simple terms. You'll always know what's being built and why.

values.title: Real commitments
values.description: If we say a date and a price, we keep them. No surprises halfway through the project.

values.title: Results that show
values.description: We don't just deliver code, we deliver systems that genuinely improve your operations.

values.title: With you long-term
values.description: The launch is just the beginning. We support you with maintenance, improvements, and support whenever you need it.

items.name: Commercial Director
items.content: Attention to detail and constant communication were key. They delivered a sales platform that not only works perfectly, but is incredibly easy to use for our entire team.

items.name: Operations Manager
items.content: They understood our internal processes almost immediately. The custom system they developed automated tasks that took us entire days. A massive leap in our productivity.

items.name: Founder
items.content: What stands out the most is their technical capability to solve complex problems straightforwardly. They built our scalable infrastructure cleanly and delivered exactly on every agreed deadline.

contact.title: Ready to start your project?
contact.subtitle: Tell us briefly what you need and we'll get back to you within 24 hours with a clear, no-obligation proposal.

form.name: Your name
form.messagePlaceholder: Briefly describe what you want to build, what it's for, and any details that help us understand you better...
form.successMessage: We'll review your request and get back to you within 24 hours with a proposal.
form.errorMessage: We couldn't send your message. Please try again or write to us directly.
services: Not sure yet, I want advice

info.availability: Dedicated to turning your ideas into reality.
